substep.title: Draft Decisions
substep.action:
For each load-bearing decision, capture: - Title (one short line) - Rationale (one sentence — the WHY) - Alternatives considered (when non-obvious) - Trade-off accepted
Categories per primary tag: - feature: type/interface shape, data-flow direction, ownership of cross-cutting concerns, extension points - bug: where the fix lives, symptom-vs-root-cause choice, regression test seam - infrastructure: vendor choice, architecture pattern, technology choice, boundary decisions - exploration: time-box, decision points, prototype strategy - hotfix: minimal-change scope, rollback plan, verification signal - chore: usually 0-1 decisions; if surfacing more, re-tag
Cross-reference DRs spawned during code-grill. Decisions already in DRs don't need re-statement here — point to them.

substep.title: Identify Vertical Slices
substep.action:
Each slice MUST be independently committable + testable. List slices in dependency order. Format under "### Vertical slices" in the design doc:
- Slice 1: {brief description; AC coverage} - Slice 2: {brief description; AC coverage} - ...
This list becomes the input to code-structure's structural skeleton.

substep.title: Identify Risk Areas
substep.action:
Where friction is most likely during I-phase. Evidence-bound: cite research findings or code references.
Format under "### Risk areas": - Risk 1: {description; affected files; mitigation if any} - Risk 2: ...

substep.title: Write to Design File
substep.action: Edit {{design_path}} → "## Design decisions" section. Replace placeholder with content + sub-sections (vertical slices, risk areas). Multi-plan identification handled in step 5.

substep.title: Spot New DR Candidates
substep.action: During the design conversation, new hard-to-reverse decisions may surface (D-phase often discovers them when alternatives are weighed). Apply the three-condition gate. If a candidate fires, scaffold via:

check.action: Edit ticket frontmatter children to add DR alias.

substep.title: Present and Stress-Test

check.action: Lock the section. Proceed to step 5.
Revise. Re-draft. Re-present. Loop within step.
